subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Its contents were replete with spiritual meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مضمون مشحون بمعانی روحانی بود مرقوم نموده
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @business; financial; property matters, @personal instructions, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
